title: Harden a function's error handling per spec
task: `withdraw` in src/account.js silently accepts garbage. Harden it per the spec comment above the function: throw TypeError for non-finite/non-number amounts, RangeError for amounts <= 0, and RangeError for overdrafts (amount > balance). The happy path must keep returning the new balance. Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
